content: Different religions and philosophical traditions have varying beliefs about what happens after death, ranging from afterlife in heaven or hell to reincarnation, or simply ceasing to exist. From a scientific perspective, biological processes end and the body decomposes, but there is no conclusive scientific evidence about consciousness after death. Ultimately, what happens after death remains one of the great mysteries of human existence.
